title: Fix coroutine calls inside lambdas
body:
I'm having issues running verilator with a basic UVM environment due to co-routine issues on the sequencer.
I'm on ubuntu 22.04, verilator v5.036, gcc 13.3

I've created a "hello world" example RTL + UVM TB at "https://github.com/joaocarvalho00/tiny_risc" that works by calling "make build"

I've followed the examples at https://github.com/MikeCovrado/GettingVerilatorStartedWithUVM and downloaded the UVM library from antmicro. I can run this example successfully but when I try to run my own example with the following flags I get this error:

I've tried removing --trace, adding std=g++20. removing UVM_NO_DPI, adding --top and nothing worked.

```
export UVM_HOME="/home/joaocarvalho00/Projects/verilator-verification-features-tests/uvm/uvm-2017/src"
UVM_PKG="${UVM_HOME}/uvm_pkg.sv"

verilator \
	--binary \
        --build \
        --cc \
        --timing \
        --exe \
	    --trace \
        --Mdir verilator_obj_dir \
        -j 1 \
	    +incdir+${UVM_HOME} \
        +incdir+src \
        +incdir+tb \
	    ${UVM_PKG} \
        +define+UVM_REPORT_DISABLE_FILE_LINE \
        +define+SVA_ON \
        +define+UVM_NO_DPI \
        tb/tb_cpu_pkg.sv \
        tb/tb_cpu_if.sv \
        src/cpu.sv \
        tb/tb_cpu.sv \
        -Wno-DECLFILENAME    \
        -Wno-CONSTRAINTIGN   \
        -Wno-MISINDENT       \
        -Wno-VARHIDDEN       \
        -Wno-WIDTHTRUNC      \
        -Wno-CASTCONST       \
        -Wno-WIDTHEXPAND     \
        -Wno-UNDRIVEN        \
        -Wno-UNUSEDSIGNAL    \
        -Wno-UNUSEDPARAM     \
        -Wno-ZERODLY         \
        -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD     \
        -Wno-CASEINCOMPLETE  \
        -Wno-SIDEEFFECT      \
        -Wno-REALCVT
```

```
Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117__Vclpkg__DepSet_h94236e61__0.cpp:29:17: error: ‘co_await’ cannot be used in a function with a deduced return type
   29 |                 co_await VL_NULL_CHECK(Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer_param_base__pi73::__PVT__m_req_fifo, "/home/joaocarvalho00/Projects/verilator-verification-features-tests/uvm/uvm-2017/src/seq/uvm_sequencer.svh", 286)
      |                 ^~~~~~~~
Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117__Vclpkg__DepSet_h94236e61__0.cpp: In member function ‘virtual VlCoroutine Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117::__VnoInFunc_item_done(VlProcessRef, Vuvm_pkg__Syms*, VlClassRef<Vuvm_pkg_tb_cpu_pkg__03a__03atb_cpu_seq_item>)’:
Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117__Vclpkg__DepSet_h94236e61__0.cpp:50:1: warning: no return statement in function returning non-void [-Wreturn-type]
   50 | }
```
code_blocks:

Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117__Vclpkg__DepSet_h94236e61__0.cpp:29:17: error: ‘co_await’ cannot be used in a function with a deduced return type
   29 |                 co_await VL_NULL_CHECK(Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer_param_base__pi73::__PVT__m_req_fifo, "/home/joaocarvalho00/Projects/verilator-verification-features-tests/uvm/uvm-2017/src/seq/uvm_sequencer.svh", 286)

Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117__Vclpkg__DepSet_h94236e61__0.cpp: In member function ‘virtual VlCoroutine Vuvm_pkg_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequencer__Tz117_TBz117::__VnoInFunc_item_done(VlProcessRef, Vuvm_pkg__Syms*, VlClassRef<Vuvm_pkg_tb_cpu_pkg__03a__03atb_cpu_seq_item>)’:
